title: carex muricata subsp. lumnitzeri
intro: Carex muricata subsp. lumnitzeri, also known as Lumnitzer's hairy sedge, is a subspecies of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Carex muricata subsp. lumnitzeri include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
